description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a blue fabric upholstery and a built-in wooden side table. The sofa features clean, straight lines and a boxy silhouette, with armrests and backrests of equal height forming a right angle. The seat and back cushions are integrated and appear firm, providing a uniform and structured look. The sofa is supported by exposed wooden legs, which are cylindrical and positioned at the corners and under the table for stability. The attached side table is made of light wood, with a rounded, two-tiered design that extends over the seat area. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for urban parks, public lounges, or modern outdoor waiting areas.
description: A modern L-shaped blue fabric sofa with integrated wooden legs and a built-in rounded wooden side table, featuring clean lines and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the L-shape, blue upholstery, and the attached two-tiered wooden side table prominently.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the chaise section and the side table extending over the seat.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the arrangement of the wooden legs beneath the sofa.
description_view_3: Opposite angled view emphasizing the sectional layout and the placement of the side table at the end of the chaise.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two integrated seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all attached and uniform in size, forming a continuous L-shaped seating area.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at both ends, matching the height of the backrest, with no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Six cylindrical wooden legs, positioned at the corners and under the side table, exposed and featuring a natural wood finish.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight backrest of medium height, matching the armrests, with no visible segmentation or tufting.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid blue fabric with a subtle woven texture, no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
